title: IT Manager – ERP, Infrastructure & Applications
description:
• Listed Company
  • Basic $5500 to $6500 + Variable Bonuses
  • Working Location: Tuas (Company Transport Provided)
  • 5 days’ work week (8:30am to 5:15pm)
  • IT operations, infrastructure, and ERP systems (SAP Business One & Microsoft Business Central)


Job Scope:


  • Oversee and maintain all IT infrastructure (local and overseas)
  • Manage and support ERP systems (SAP Business One, Microsoft Business Central)
  • Customize and enhance ERP using Crystal Reports and SQL
  • Lead IT team and provide technical guidance
  • Develop and maintain internal software applications and public website
  • Perform database administration and ensure system performance
  • Handle IT procurement, budgeting, and vendor management
  • Prepare IT reports for management and support audits
  • Ensure compliance with IT procedures, security, and quality standards
  • Conduct user training and support ERP/system troubleshooting
  • Manage yearly price updates and SOP/license reviews
  • Keep users informed on IT trends and risks

Requirement:

  • Degree in Information Technology or 2 years relevant fields
  • Experienced working as a Systems Engineer, Network Engineer, Database Administrator, ERP Analyst & Security Analyst
  • Prior working experience in any ERP systems. Preferable Business One and Microsoft Business Central and MS NAV.
  • 4 - 6 years’ experience in Programming, Specification, Software Design and Implementation of Application
  • Handled at least 1 ERP full SDLC implementation project.
  • Web and domain management

Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume

  • Work experiences and job responsibilities
  • Current and Expected salary
    Reason for leaving
  • Date of availability
  • Education background



We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



NG DIAUM YEE (R2198031)

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd

EA License No: 21C0492

postedCompany.description:
EA Recruitment Pte Ltd was founded in 2021, with a focused mission, providing our utmost support to individuals and organisations, to achieve their full potential. With a combined experience of more than 10 years, we thrive on providing our clients/candidates with the best and most sincere services. We believe not only in the business aspect of things, but able to help individuals & organisations on a personal level.


Empowerment - To empower our team in making sound decisions, efficiently.

Exceptional – We are dedicated to providing a holistic and an exceptional level of service to our clients.

Ethical – To behave ethically, and to make moral decisions based on integrity.

Accomplishment – We strive to accomplish all planned objectives and conquering set milestones.

Accountable – We are accountable for our actions, decisions, and consequences.

Assurance – We are committed to provide the best services to our clients


We provide permanent full-time and/or temporary placements, contract staffing solutions and foreign workers recruitment.
